The Bow Gallery

A curated archive of 30 masterwork bow silhouettes, from recurve longbows to mystical great-bows. Managed via the Sector VII Ledger for high-fidelity LOD optimization and export.

Eagle-Eye Longbow

Tier: VII Arcanist

Tier: V Stalker

Tier: II Berserker
